Home.headlineLead: My path is anything but linear.
Home.subtitle: I design and build complete web apps with Next.js — from the interface to the database.

fondations.label: 01 · The journey
fondations.title: Three detours, one guiding idea: building things that last.
fondations.intro: The rigor of law, self-reliance learned on the road, code fundamentals learned the hard way — every detour serves your projects today.

law.title: Law degree
law.text: Reading systems that tolerate no approximation. Rigor, before code.

asia.title: Three years across Asia
asia.text: Vietnam by motorbike. Deciding, moving and delivering without supervision.

school42.title: École 42
school42.text: The fundamentals, learned the hard way — in C, with no teachers.

npe.label: 02 · NP-Evolution
npe.title: From the interface to the database, shipped solo.
npe.intro: A career-coaching consultant was managing files, appointments and documents by hand. NP-Evolution structures the entire journey — from first interview to final signature.

bullets.pdf: Interactive PDFs generated on the fly

elloha.label: 03 · Elloha
elloha.title: Holding up at scale.
elloha.intro: Elloha is a French booking platform for independent tourism businesses: a booking engine, a channel manager connected to 60+ channels — Booking, Airbnb, Expedia, Google — and a website builder. I work on the front end, within the product team.
elloha.team: At this scale, every regression has an immediate cost for real merchants: code reviews, tests, progressive rollouts — reliability is a team effort.

Journey.strip: interface → api → database · next.js · typescript · prisma · postgresql · react · node

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.text: Got a project in mind? Available for freelance Next.js work.
